title: Wandering Wildlife
description: A Vanilla+ animal mod that adds Red Pandas to bamboo jungles. Features custom animations, breeding, and trust mechanics. Perfect for aesthetic modpacks and players who want more wildlife.
body:
Ever feel like Minecraft's forests are a bit... quiet? **Wandering Wildlife** aims to breathe new life into the world by introducing unique animals one at a time. Rather than adding hundreds of creatures, we focus on depth and personality, ensuring every addition feels like a natural part of the vanilla ecosystem. This is the first release, and it's only the beginning. More creatures will join the world as development continues.

  Red Panda

Introducing the **Red Panda**, a charming and expressive inhabitant of the bamboo forests. These little guys are masters of relaxation, often found sleeping away the daylight hours (and snoring quite loudly). While they are generally shy, they possess a unique "scare tactic"—standing on their hind legs to appear larger when approached. | 🍎 Favorite Food | 🥚 Trust Item | 🌲 Home Biome | | :--- | :--- | :--- | | Bamboo | Egg | Bamboo Jungle | If you want to **befriend** a Red Panda, you’ll need a few eggs and a bit of patience. Once you've earned their trust, they will no longer view you as a threat. To **breed** them, provide some fresh bamboo, just like their larger giant panda cousins.

**Key behaviors:** * 💤 **Diurnal Sleep:** Naturally sleeps during the day; waking them abruptly will cause a brief panic. * 🐾 **Intimidation Display:** Will stand on hind legs if a player or mob gets too close. * 🛡️ **Hostile Awareness:** Readily spooked by nearby monsters. --- ### ⚙️ Compatibility Wandering Wildlife is designed to be fully compatible with other mods. We aim to ensure our animals interact seamlessly with both vanilla and modded biomes. ### 💬 Community This mod is a work in progress, and your feedback helps shape its future. [**Submit Feedback & Ideas**](your_link) | [**Report a Bug**](your_link) ### 📜 License Wandering Wildlife is licensed under the **MIT License**. You are free to include this mod in any modpack!
